name: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite

metaDescription: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite (Google), released 2026-03-03 — part of the Gemini Flash-Lite line. Current Flash-Lite; launched in preview March 2026, GA May 7, 2026.
overview: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Flash-Lite line. Released 2026-03-03. Google's fastest and lowest-cost Gemini tier, optimized for intelligence per dollar.
What's notable in this version: Current Flash-Lite; launched in preview March 2026, GA May 7, 2026.
